nasb.text: and He who searches the hearts knows what the mind of the Spirit is, because He intercedes for the saints according to the will of God.

esv.text: And he who searches hearts knows what is the mind of the Spirit, because the Spirit intercedes for the saints according to the will of God.

cnv.text: 那鑒察人心的，曉得聖靈的心意，因為聖靈照著　神的旨意替聖徒祈求。

ccb.text: 洞悉人心的上帝知道圣灵的意思，因为圣灵是照着上帝的旨意替圣徒祈祷。

csbs.text: 而且，洞察人心的那一位，知道圣灵的意念是什么，因为圣灵是按神的意思为圣徒代求的。
